overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Batman: Arkham Knight showing Batman walking along a gothic waterfront promenade at night toward a crashed military vehicle. The scene features detailed cobblestone paths, art deco architecture, and atmospheric lighting with a cool blue-grey color palette.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated waterfront promenade with gothic railings

agents.ego_description: Batman walking steadily along the curved cobblestone path toward the crashed vehicle visible ahead

entered.detail: tall art deco building facade with illuminated windows and stone texture
large cylindrical stone pillar with horizontal metal bands supporting overhead structure
ornate black metal railings along the waterfront edge
overturned military tank or APC with smoke rising from the wreckage
elevated monorail or railway tracks running overhead with metal framework
dark water of the harbor visible beyond the railings

segments.scene_description: Batman walks along a narrow cobblestone promenade beside a gothic waterfront. The path curves gently with ornate metal railings on the right overlooking the harbor. Ahead, a crashed armored vehicle lies overturned beneath an elevated transit structure, with smoke rising from the wreckage visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: crash site with overturned military vehicle

events.description: approaching the smoking wreckage of the crashed armored vehicle

agents.ego_description: Batman slowing as he reaches the crash site to examine the overturned vehicle and surrounding debris

entered.detail: broken concrete chunks and metal fragments scattered around the crash site
red painted metal structural framework near the overturned vehicle
tall illuminated buildings visible through the gap between structures
bright white spotlight beam cutting through the night sky

segments.scene_description: Batman arrives at the crash site where the armored vehicle lies overturned on the cobblestones. Debris is scattered around the wreckage near a red support structure. The city skyline and a searchlight beam are visible in the background as Batman examines the scene from close proximity.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a gothic waterfront promenade that culminates at the wreckage of a military crash. It begins with Batman walking along a narrow cobblestone path, curving beside ornate metal railings that overlook the harbor. As he advances, the view opens up to reveal an overturned armored vehicle beneath an elevated transit structure, with plumes of smoke rising into the night air. The scene then shifts to a close-up perspective as Batman arrives at the crash site, moving through scattered debris near a red support structure. Finally, the camera settles on the wreckage with the city skyline and a sweeping searchlight beam illuminating the background.
